executives.name: Xing Wang
executives.background: Mr. Xing Wang has served as our director since July 2019. Mr. Wang is the co-founder, an executive director, the chairman of the board of directors and the chief executive officer of Meituan (HKEX: 3690). Mr. Wang is responsible for the overall strategic planning, business direction and management of Meituan.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman of the Board, Chief Executive Officer, Co-Founder
